title: cacalia divergens
intro: Cacalia divergens, also known as golden ragwort or California cacalia, is a perennial plant native to the western coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Cacalia divergens is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional folk remedies and natural supplements.
